title: Aureline surface contract packet
description: Machine-readable packet for a stable-facing or future stable-facing interface surface. The same packet shape covers JSON Schema exports, WIT worlds, OpenAPI families, field registries, event envelopes, and mixed-version envelopes so compatibility, docs, migration, deprecation, release, and support lanes cite one surface id instead of inventing parallel ids.

schema_version.description: Schema version for the surface contract packet itself. Current value is 1.

surface_id.description: Stable surface identifier. Compatibility, docs, migration, deprecation, and release work cite this id verbatim.

summary.description: One or two sentence description of what the surface governs.

maturity_lane.description: Stable-facing surfaces normally use stable or beta. Experimental and internal rows still use this packet shape.

contract_form.description: Contract form such as json_schema_backed_contract_doc, wit_world_package, openapi_family, record_registry, or event_envelope_schema.

backup_waiver.description: Waiver id from ownership_matrix when backup_owner is null.

publication_artifact_refs.description: Docs, schemas, manifests, or row refs that publish the contract.

schema_or_interface_directory_refs.description: Schema or interface directories for this surface. Use the sentinel not_yet_seeded when the directory has not landed yet.

rule_summary.description: How additive versus breaking changes are recognized for this surface.

compatibility_window_source_ref.description: Row or artifact ref that currently defines the claimed compatibility window.

canonical_writers.description: Named producers that emit the surface.

canonical_readers.description: Named consumers that parse, project, or replay the surface.

reader_semantics.description: Reader-side semantics such as unknown-field handling, projection honesty, and fail-closed posture.

writer_semantics.description: Writer-side semantics such as explicit version emission, preservation rules, and mutation discipline.

downgrade_behavior.description: How the surface narrows, refuses, or migrates when a reader or writer falls outside the declared window.

compatibility_window_summary.description: Plain-language summary of the current compatibility or skew promise.

support_window_posture.description: Declared support-window posture for the surface.

compatibility_report_refs.description: Compatibility-report artifacts or row refs that must cite this surface.

migration_guidance_refs.description: Migration or import/export guidance artifacts or row refs for this surface.

dependency_markers.description: Explicit dependency markers on preview, labs, policy-gated, or external surfaces.

deprecation_posture.description: Replacement path, alias map, removal horizon or review checkpoint, and required docs/help visibility.

review_cadence.description: How often the surface packet must be re-consulted.

docs_touchpoint_refs.description: Docs, help, or review artifacts humans use when inspecting the surface.

ref.description: Repo-relative path, row ref, or the sentinel not_yet_seeded.

allOf.description: Every packet names a backup owner or cites an active waiver.
